untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection for 'ultimate low reversal' requires identifying the lowest point in a lookback period and confirming a 20% rebound from that specific low. This requires custom pattern logic (finding local minima and calculating percentage recovery from that point) which cannot be expressed using only the standard price and technical indicators provided. The 'ultimate_low' concept requires pattern-specific state tracking not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The signal describes a multi-bar pattern requiring: (1) identification of an ultimate/swing low, (2) confirmation of 20% rebound from that low, (3) trend continuation. This is a complex pattern that needs custom pattern recognition logic beyond standard technical indicators. Average rise of 54-56% after the 20% rebound suggests a hold period of ~30-50 days based on the source data showing 27-53 days to ultimate low. Exit condition set to simple reversal since AUTHOR_SILENT on specific exit rules.
